input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule F.8.5.4 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: f.8.5.4
            TITLE: if the impact attenuator is attached by welding:

            CONTENT:
            rule F.8.5.4: If the Impact Attenuator is attached by welding:
F.8.5.4 If the Impact Attenuator is attached by welding:  
a. Welds may be continuous or interrupted
Formula SAE® Rules 2024 © 2023 SAE International  Page 46 of 140   
Version 1.0   1 Sep 2023 
b. If interrupted, the weld/space ratio must be 1:1 or higher  
c. All weld lengths must be more than 25 mm

final_answer: rule F.8.5.4: If the Impact Attenuator is attached by welding: F.8.5.4 If the Impact Attenuator is attached by welding: a. Welds may be continuous or interrupted b. If interrupted, the weld/space ratio must be 1:1 or higher c. All weld lengths must be more than 25 mm
